_source: observo docs/transform.md:11 (AddTransformRequest/site_managerTransform schema) + observo docs/lua-script.md:15-24 (Lua Script / Metric Event / Bypass Transform config semantics); captured 2026-04-14 via plan Phase 4.A
_notes: The AddTransformRequest envelope is {"transform": site_managerTransform}. The site_managerTransform.config is typed `{type: object}` in the OpenAPI blob (opaque) so the docs do NOT pin the exact config field names. The config field names (luaScript, metricEvent, bypassTransform) below are the camelCase forms already used by production code paths (components/observo_models.py:300-302,524-526 and components/observo_pipeline_builder.py:184-188) and the observo docs/lua-script.md user-facing labels ("Lua Script", "Metric Event", "Bypass Transform"). This cassette is the authoritative record. A real HTTP capture against a sandbox tenant would either confirm this shape or drive a cassette update.
